Home.ctaJobseekersDesc: We offer a wide range of positions in manufacturing, logistics, and office work to find the perfect job for you.
Home.ctaEmployersDesc: We quickly propose the best talent to match your company's needs.
Home.contactDesc: For job inquiries or staffing consultations, please reach out by phone or email.
Home.ctaDesc: SANTO delivers the perfect match for every individual.
Home.ctaJobseekersBullet1: Wide range of positions: manufacturing, logistics, office
Home.ctaJobseekersBullet3: Full social insurance and paid leave
Home.ctaEmployersBullet2: Extensive talent in manufacturing, logistics, office

ServiceOverview.label: SERVICE
ServiceOverview.title: SANTO's Staffing Services
ServiceOverview.subtitle: Connecting companies
ServiceOverview.diagramDesc: We explain the basic staffing relationship that connects companies and staff. We manage recruitment, payroll, and benefits while staff work at your location.
ServiceOverview.dispatchDesc: As the staffing agency, SANTO handles everything from recruitment to payroll and labor management. You can focus solely on directing staff, significantly reducing costs and effort.
ServiceOverview.outsourcingDesc: Our outsourcing service handles entire operations. We assign production managers and provide comprehensive support from staff management to quality control.

FeatureCards.problem1:
I'm worried about working
as a temp for the first time...
FeatureCards.solution1Desc: From before to during employment, a dedicated coordinator provides personalized follow-up. We're always ready to address your concerns.
FeatureCards.problem2:
We urgently need staff...
Can you respond quickly?
FeatureCards.solution2Desc: We respond quickly to your needs and promptly propose the best talent. We flexibly handle urgent staffing requirements.
FeatureCards.problem3:
We can't find people
with the right skills...
FeatureCards.solution3Desc: We maintain a diverse pool of talent across manufacturing, logistics, and office roles. We match the right people to your exact needs.

NewsScroller.label: News
NewsScroller.news1Desc: SANTO Co., Ltd. has completely renewed its website with a more user-friendly design.
NewsScroller.news2Desc: We are urgently recruiting staff for manufacturing lines and logistics warehouses. No experience required, with thorough training provided.
NewsScroller.news3Desc: We are holding free consultation sessions for companies seeking staffing solutions. Please feel free to join.
NewsScroller.news4Desc: We would like to inform you about our year-end and New Year holiday schedule. We apologize for any inconvenience.

CountUpStats.label: NUMBERS
CountUpStats.title: SANTO by the Numbers
CountUpStats.desc1: Our track record speaks for itself.
CountUpStats.stat1Desc: We have connected numerous job seekers with companies over the years.
CountUpStats.stat2Desc: We work with companies across manufacturing, logistics, office, and many other industries.
CountUpStats.stat3Desc: Our follow-up support during employment is highly rated, maintaining high satisfaction levels.
CountUpStats.stat4Desc: We propose job opportunities within 24 hours of your inquiry.

HexMerits.merit1Desc: We carefully listen to your preferences and propose the ideal position.
HexMerits.merit2Desc: You can check the workplace atmosphere in advance for peace of mind.
HexMerits.merit3Desc: A dedicated coordinator is always available for consultation.
HexMerits.merit4Desc: Health insurance, pension, employment insurance, and paid leave included.
HexMerits.merit5Desc: Our training programs and support systems are well established.
HexMerits.merit6Desc: We provide detailed multilingual support for international staff.

StrengthTimeline.desc1: We propose talent from your initial inquiry in the shortest time possible. We respond to urgent staffing needs.
StrengthTimeline.desc2: We consider not just skills and experience, but personality and workplace compatibility in our selections.
StrengthTimeline.desc3: Through regular follow-ups with dispatched staff, we support stable employment.
StrengthTimeline.desc4: Significantly reduce the time and cost of hiring. Secure the talent you need, when you need them.
StrengthTimeline.desc5: We maintain a talent network that covers a wide range of positions across manufacturing, logistics, and office work.
StrengthTimeline.desc6: We comply with all labor laws and regulations, providing services you can trust.

FlowProgress.completeDesc: SANTO supports you every step of the way.

JobCategories.cat3_job1Desc: Product retrieval based on order sheets

EmployerIndustries.cat1_job1Desc: Dispatch of assembly and processing personnel for production lines

EmployerIndustries.cat1_job3Desc: Rapid proposal of certified, experienced operators
EmployerIndustries.cat2_job3Desc: Personnel for inventory and stocktaking operations
EmployerIndustries.cat3_job1Desc: Ready-to-work talent for documentation and phone support
EmployerIndustries.cat3_job2Desc: Dispatch of accurate data processing personnel
EmployerIndustries.cat3_job3Desc: Quick introduction of experienced accounting staff
EmployerIndustries.cat3_job4Desc: Proposal of talent with extensive customer service experience

About.pageSubtitle: Building bridges between people and companies with trust and proven results.
About.messageP1: Thank you for visiting the SANTO Co., Ltd. website.
About.messageP2: Our company has been dedicated to serving as a bridge between job seekers and companies through our staffing services. By valuing each individual's personality and skills, we achieve optimal matching to contribute to fulfilling career development and company growth.
About.messageP3: We will continue striving to provide trustworthy services. Thank you for your continued support.
About.philosophyDesc: We believe in the potential of every worker and pursue optimal matching between companies and talent through personalized support.
About.historyDesc: A proven track record built on community focus.

Jobseekers.pageSubtitle: Let's find the perfect job for you, together.
Jobseekers.meritDesc: Discover why so many job seekers continue to choose SANTO.
Jobseekers.faq1Q: Is it okay if I've never worked as a temp before?
Jobseekers.faq1A: Yes, absolutely. We provide thorough support for beginners, from explaining job details to follow-up after placement.
Jobseekers.faq2Q: Can I enroll in social insurance?
Jobseekers.faq2A: Yes, those who meet certain conditions can enroll in health insurance, pension, and employment insurance.
Jobseekers.faq3A: No, registration is completely free. Please feel free to contact us.
Jobseekers.faq4A: Yes, if you have a valid residence status, you can register with us. We also offer multilingual support.
Jobseekers.faq5Q: Can I choose my start date?
Jobseekers.faq5A: Yes, you can. Let us know your preferred start date and we will suggest positions that match your schedule.
Jobseekers.faq6A: Yes, we offer a variety of positions ranging from a few days to long-term assignments. Please let us know your preferences.
Jobseekers.faq7A: Yes, transportation allowance may be provided depending on the assignment. Please check with your coordinator for details.
Jobseekers.faq8Q: What should I do if I have problems during my assignment?
Jobseekers.faq8A: Your dedicated coordinator will follow up with you regularly. Feel free to reach out anytime with any concerns or questions.
Jobseekers.faq9A: No, there is no age limit. We welcome workers of all ages and will match you with positions suited to your experience and skills.
Jobseekers.ctaTitle: Looking for a Job? Contact Us Today
Jobseekers.ctaDesc: Registration is free. Please reach out via our contact form or by phone.
Jobseekers.step1Desc: Register easily by phone or through our website.
Jobseekers.step2Desc: We listen carefully to your preferred conditions and skills.
Jobseekers.step3Desc: We propose the perfect job for you.
Jobseekers.step4Desc: We continue to support you after you start.

Employers.pageSubtitle: We quickly propose the optimal talent for your company.
Employers.leadDesc: SANTO Co., Ltd. provides staffing services to companies across manufacturing, logistics, and many other industries. We propose optimal talent solutions to address your challenges, from resolving labor shortages to improving operational efficiency.
Employers.stat1Desc: Working with a wide range of industries
Employers.step1Desc: Start with a phone call or form submission. We're happy to hear from you.
Employers.step2Desc: We'll learn about your ideal candidate, job details, and employment conditions.
Employers.step3Desc: We propose suitable candidates and arrange workplace visits.
Employers.step4Desc: After contract signing, work begins. Regular follow-ups ensure stable operations.
Employers.ctaTitle: Feel Free to Consult Us About Staffing
Employers.ctaDesc: Tell us about your challenges first. We'll propose the best plan for you.

Access.trainValue: 3-minute walk from Hiratsuka Station (JR Tokaido Line)
Access.carValue: Approx. 10 minutes from Hiratsuka IC (Odawara-Atsugi Expressway)
Access.hoursNote: * Closed on weekends and public holidays

Contact.pageSubtitle: Whether you're looking for work or talent, feel free to reach out.
Contact.thankYouDesc: We have received your inquiry. A representative will contact you shortly.
Contact.formIntro: Please fill in the form below and submit.
